description: Three-column advantages block with centered heading, optional intro text, and one featured middle card.
goals: Keep the content reusable across industries
Preserve exactly three cards with one highlighted card

fieldGuidance.heading: 2-4 words, uppercase section heading.
fieldGuidance.items[].title: 2-4 words, short advantage label.
fieldGuidance.items[].icon: Use a valid Font Awesome class name without the style prefix.
